mapper.insert: INSERT INTO schedule_project ( project_key, project_name, project_type_code, project_status, owner_user_id, origin_address, start_date, end_date, description ) VALUES ( #{project_key}, #{project_name}, #{project_type_code}, #{project_status}, #{owner_user_id}, #{origin_address}, CAST(#{start_date} AS DATE), CAST(#{end_date} AS DATE), #{description} )
mapper.update: UPDATE schedule_project SET project_key = #{project_key}, project_name = #{project_name}, project_type_code = #{project_type_code}, project_status = #{project_status}, owner_user_id = #{owner_user_id}, origin_address = #{origin_address}, start_date = CAST(#{start_date} AS DATE), end_date = CAST(#{end_date} AS DATE), description = #{description}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE project_id = #{project_id}
mapper.select:
SELECT pm.project_member_id, pm.project_id, pm.user_id, pm.user_nm, pm.project_role, pm.created_at, COALESCE(pm.user_nm || '(' || pm.user_id || ')', pm.user_id) AS label FROM schedule_project_member pm INNER JOIN schedule_project p ON p.project_id = pm.project_id
AND pm.project_id = #{project_id}
AND ( pm.user_id ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR pm.user_nm ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY CASE pm.project_role WHEN 'OWNER' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, pm.user_nm NULLS LAST, pm.user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO schedule_project_member ( project_id, user_id, user_nm, project_role ) VALUES ( #{project_id}, #{user_id}, #{user_nm}, COALESCE(#{project_role}, 'MEMBER') ) ON CONFLICT (project_id, user_id) DO UPDATE SET user_nm = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.user_nm, schedule_project_member.user_nm), project_role = CASE WHEN schedule_project_member.project_role = 'OWNER' THEN 'OWNER' ELSE EXCLUDED.project_role END
INSERT INTO schedule_project_member ( project_id, user_id, project_role ) VALUES ( #{project_id}, #{owner_user_id}, 'OWNER' ) ON CONFLICT (project_id, user_id) DO UPDATE SET project_role = 'OWNER'
